description: Write a Python script using sumolib to compute a 120-second free-flow travel time isochrone representing ambulance reachability in the Bologna Acosta network (~/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/acosta_buslanes.net.xml). The starting edge is the longest non-internal edge with at least one outgoing connection, with ties broken by alphabetical ID. The script must calculate reachability based on cumulative free-flow travel time (length/speed) starting from the beginning of the starting edge and traversing outgoing connections. An edge is reachable if the minimum cumulative travel time to reach its end is 120.0 seconds or less. Output the starting edge ID and the total count of reachable edges to ~/SUMO_Output/isochrone_summary.txt. Additionally, generate a SUMO GUI selection file at ~/SUMO_Output/isochrone_selection.txt containing all reachable edge IDs formatted as edge:EDGE_ID on each line.
